archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Heritage Luxury

typography.pairing_strategy: Classic Serif Head + Clean Sans Body. Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for an ancient, royal heritage feel. Ensure tight tracking on large headings (`tracking-tight`) and loose leading on body copy (`leading-relaxed`) with 'Manrope' for readability.

visual_enhancers.backgrounds: Apply the 'ajrakh_texture' image as a repeating or fixed background layer with very low opacity (e.g., `opacity-5` or `opacity-10`) to provide a tactile, hand-crafted heritage feel rather than flat white spaces.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px solid borders in `border_subtle` (#E5DCD3) or 10% opacity indigo. Corners should be crisp (`rounded-none`) or extremely subtle (`rounded-sm`) to emulate traditional Victorian framing seen in their logo.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Keep shadows diffuse, soft, and minimal. Avoid heavy modern drop-shadows. Emphasize optical clarity and light.
visual_enhancers.overlays: Hero text should not just sit raw on an image. Use a gentle dark gradient overlay (`bg-gradient-to-t from-[#1A2441]/70 to-transparent`) or a framed solid/glass card to ensure readability without muddying the craft.

motion.scroll: Smooth scrolling is highly recommended. Incorporate a library like `lenis` for premium weight and momentum.
motion.transitions: Slow, poetic fades. Use Framer Motion with `ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1]` and `duration: 0.8` to 1.2s. Avoid fast, bouncy SaaS animations.
motion.hover: Subtle shifts: Text color shifts, images in lookbook scale up very slowly (`scale-105` over `0.6s`) for a cinematic, editorial feel.

components.buttons: Square or `rounded-sm`. Use solid Indigo background with Ivory text for primary, or outline buttons with Indigo borders for secondary. 'Enquire on WhatsApp' CTA can use Madder Red or Ochre for a subtle, earthy highlight.
components.cards: Cardless or very subtle 1px border. Focus on large, high-quality imagery with generous internal padding.
components.navigation: Sticky, using elegant glassmorphism (`bg-[#FAF9F6]/80 backdrop-blur-xl`) with a 1px subtle bottom border, ensuring the serif logo sits proudly.
components.data_testids: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='nav-shop-link'`, `data-testid='enquire-whatsapp-btn'`).
components.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (light or thin weight) for a refined, non-intrusive look.

logo.description: DEVASAYA Brand Logo (Deep Indigo, ornate frame)

layout_spacing.padding: Extremely generous. Use `py-20`, `py-32` for main sections. Let the content breathe like an art gallery.
layout_spacing.grid: Bento-style or wide asymmetrical grids for the Lookbook and Process sections to break monotony and create tension.
layout_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs for readability. Center-align poetic headlines or quotes in 'The Ajrakh Story' to create a directed, emotional flow.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build out the frontend using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn components where appropriate (customizing Shadcn heavily to remove the Vercel look).
Incorporate the `ajrakh_texture` as a repeating background layer with low opacity via Tailwind utility classes.
Include the Google Fonts link in your HTML, and configure Tailwind to use `Cormorant Garamond` for headings and `Manrope` for body.
Create a storytelling-first experience with slow fades and elegant reveals.

Implement the following pages/sections: Home, The Ajrakh Story, Artisans of Kutch, Process (Craftsmanship Journey), Shop/Collection, Lookbook, Journal/Blog, Sustainability & Values, About Devasaya, Contact.
In the Shop and Product Detail pages, use an 'Enquire on WhatsApp' CTA (linking to +91 9340853746) instead of a direct cart/checkout flow.
Add a simple Admin panel to manage products and journal posts.
